name: Uptime Kuma
description: A self-hosted monitoring tool to track the uptime of your websites, APIs and services, with real-time dashboards, beautiful status pages and instant notifications to Slack, Telegram, email and 90+ integrations.

aws.parity: Uptime Kuma monitors the same endpoints that Route 53 Health Checks poll — validate your alerting thresholds and notification flows locally before wiring up CloudWatch alarms.
aws.deploy: Create Route 53 Health Checks for your production endpoints and configure CloudWatch alarms to trigger SNS notifications on failure.

variables.label: Web Port
variables.description: Port on your host machine to access the Uptime Kuma dashboard.
